About me

Strategy meets
storytelling

Over the last decade, I have worked across journalism, social media, communications and influencer marketing, helping brands connect with audiences through storytelling, community building and culturally relevant campaigns.

My background in games journalism gave me an instinct for what audiences want before analytics could tell me and years running Bethesda España's social channels sharpened that into a practice: knowing when to be funny, when to be bold, and when to let the community lead.

I'm at my best working at the intersection of brand voice, cultural relevance and measurable results.

Community-first thinking
Brand voice & tone
Campaign strategy
Cultural relevance
Influencer relations
Storytelling

Selected Work

Case Studies
Social Media & Community · 2021–2024

Bethesda Spain —
Building a gaming community in Spanish

Led all social media strategy, content creation and community management for Bethesda's Spanish-language channels across Twitter/X, Instagram and Facebook. Supported every major AAA launch from Starfield to DOOM: The Dark Ages adapting global campaign assets for local audiences and managing creator partnerships.

Social Strategy Community Management Localisation Influencer Campaigns Content Creation Reporting

Influencer Marketing · Campaign

Creator campaigns —
Turning launches into cultural moments

Designed and executed influencer campaigns for several Bethesda games launches, briefing and coordinating a roster of Spanish-language gaming creators. Managed the full cycle from creator selection and briefing to content tracking and final reporting.

Journalism & Content

MeriStation · Writing

My years at MeriStation, Red Bull and Cuatro TV sharpened my instinct for what an audience wants and taught me to explain complex things simply, tell stories with emotion, and always lead with what matters. I have also authored two books: La Última Exploradora. Un recorrido por la saga Tomb Raider and The Last of Us. La humanidad en juego.
